summary:
Evaluates 3 issues:

A) Auto-Patch toggle is hardcoded to True in New Content pipeline, ignoring the UI checkbox.

B) Blueprint filter (_extract_chapter_blueprint) has confirmed data loss: key_data items are plain English descriptions that don't match any blueprint JSON keys; life_phase_covered gets comma-concatenated by AI so substring matching fails. Result: chapters lose 84-88% of available data (life_phases, achievements, conflicts, turning_points).

C) Four proposed schema additions are evaluated: financial_arc (approved, in core_identity), final_words+who_was_present (approved, in death), vices_and_obsessions (approved as highest priority, in personal_profile), documented_close_calls (approved with caution due to hallucination risk, in turning_points).
